selection.caveat: window boundaries derive from LLM-generated timestamps; frames are canonical
transcript_excerpt: [0s-37s] The person holds a white onesie, manipulating it with their hands to inspect the seams. Using small blue snipping scissors in their right hand, they cut loose threads from various parts of the garment.
[37s-41s] The person folds the onesie in half and then again, placing the finished garment onto a neat pile on the right side of the table.
[41s-45s] The person reaches to the left, picks up a new white onesie from the unfinished pile, and lays it out in the center of the table.
[45s-66s] The person inspects the new garment, lifting and turning it while using the snipping scissors to carefully remove loose threads along the top and bottom seams.
window_activities: Snip loose threads with small clippers
